title: Tick Control in Bedford Park, Bronx | $125 – $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Bedford Park, Bronx. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases. Same-day service available. Call now for a free quote!
intro: Bedford Park residents face increasing tick exposure due to proximity to green spaces like the New York Botanical Garden and local parks. Our professional tick control services protect Bedford Park families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with targeted treatments for yards, gardens, and surrounding areas. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick elimination and prevention services starting at just $125.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving Bedford Park and the greater Bronx area with eco-friendly tick control solutions that are safe for children and pets. Our licensed technicians understand the unique tick challenges in Bedford Park's residential neighborhoods and provide customized treatment plans with guaranteed results.
localContext: Bedford Park's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Harris Park and Mosholu Parkway create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. Whether you live in one of the neighborhood's classic pre-war apartment buildings or single-family homes near Lehman College, our tick control services protect your outdoor spaces year-round.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Bedford Park typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, ticks can be active year-round during warmer winters, so we recommend preventative treatments starting in early spring and continuing through late fall.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Bedford Park?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Bedford Park range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer single treatments as well as seasonal packages that provide the best value and ongoing protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our trained professionals. We recommend keeping pets and children inside during application and for 2-3 hours after treatment, then your yard will be safe to enjoy.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Our treatments create a protective barrier that continues working for 30-60 days, and we recommend follow-up treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season for maximum protection.
